appDescription: Type your Markdown notes here. They are saved to the URL, making them easy to bookmark or share with others. You can also save them in your browser.
shareInstruction: Share this URL to share your notes instantly.
saveFail: Failed to save notes to browser
clearConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all notes? This will delete them from the browser and URL.
qrCodeViewSummary: See QR code for this URL
